Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Model A correctly identified the explicit link between 'ethics' (Competency B/G) and reducing corruption (Target 16.5), and global finance to illicit flows (Target 16.4).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Model A correctly identified the strong, explicit links between 'global asset management' and mobilizing financial resources (Target 17.3) and macroeconomic stability (Target 17.13).
